title: A round multicolor UFO spotted in Ribeirão Preto-SP [1999]

text_preview: APRIL, 5th, 1999. Time: 05h20 am. Duration: 40 minutes. A resident of Ribeirão Preto, State of São Paulo, reported seeing an unidentified flying object with a round shape and colors ranging from orange, red and blue. According to the witness, the object remained stationary most of the time, and from her position – in relation to the observed UFO and the object’s altitude – it seemed that the object was “the same size as the Moon”, as seen in the firmament. Additional observations in the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] state that it was: “Moon-sized object, positioned ab
summary: A Ribeirão Preto resident observed a multicolored (orange, red, blue) round stationary UFO appearing moon-sized for 40 minutes on April 5, 1999.
